prompt: Create a seven-panel executive carousel for 'Security Automation Needs Guardrails'. Panels: 1 title; 2 speed changes consequence; 3 faster is not automatically safer; 4 boundaries are architecture; 5 least privilege and approval tiers; 6 auditability and accountability; 7 operating principle: guardrails make automation trustworthy enough to use. Use vendor-neutral security architecture visuals.
proof_boundaries: Do not imply capabilities of specific current security products.
Do not claim quantified incident-response or risk-reduction outcomes.
Do not depict automated remediation as appropriate for every event.
